input: Run executive pitch on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected executive pitch output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the executive pitch workflow

input: Apply executive pitch to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive executive pitch analysis with evidence-tagged findings
